task_completion.description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open with the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface with 'Sample Order Lines' visible in the Data Panel on the left.

task_completion.description: A scatter plot visualization is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a scatter plot chart type selected in the visualization type menu or a scatter plot displayed in the main canvas.

task_completion.description: 'Sales' is configured on the X-Axis and 'Profit' on the Y-Axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sales' in the X-Axis grammar drop target and 'Profit' in the Y-Axis grammar drop target in the visualization configuration panel.
Look for 'Product Category' in the Color grammar drop target in the visualization configuration panel.

task_completion.description: A logarithmic scale is applied to the X-Axis (Sales).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the X-Axis properties panel showing 'Scale Type' set to 'Logarithmic', or the X-Axis values on the chart visually reflecting a logarithmic progression (e.g., 1, 10, 100, 1000).

task_completion.description: The visualization title is set to 'Log-Scale Profit Distribution'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Log-Scale Profit Distribution' at the top of the visualization canvas or in the title properties panel.
Look for the workbook name 'Distribution_Analysis' in the top title bar of the application or a save dialog confirming the name.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface (drag-and-drop, clicking menus) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be Oracle Analytics Desktop, not a mock-up, text editor, or a different BI tool.

integrity.description: The agent built the visualization step-by-step.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the visualization being constructed (adding axes, changing properties) rather than just opening a pre-existing 'Distribution_Analysis.dva' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target visualization requires a scatter plot in Oracle Analytics Desktop. The X-axis must be 'Sales' with a Logarithmic scale (valid since all Sales > 0). The Y-axis must be 'Profit'. The file should be saved natively as 'Distribution_Analysis.dva'.
